description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring multiple rooms visible through cutaway walls. The exterior is primarily composed of reddish-brown brick with white-framed windows and doors, and there are several green lawn patches adjacent to the structure. The interior layout includes a variety of rooms such as bedrooms, a kitchen, dining areas, and living spaces, each decorated with distinct wall colors and furnishings. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the exterior walls, providing natural light to the interior. The main entryway is marked by a white door set into a recessed section of the facade, with a small green lawn in front. The house exhibits a practical, modern suburban style with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional living spaces.
description: A single-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a detailed interior layout featuring multiple rooms and green lawn patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, green lawn, and a clear look into the living and dining areas through cutaway walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, additional green lawn, and a glimpse into bedrooms and living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window placement, dining area, and more private rooms towards the back of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the house's depth, colorful interior rooms, and secondary entry points.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a white door, small green lawn, and no porch or decorative columns.
